tasks.title: VM: Knowledge API — runtime 讀 JSON 取代 build-time 打包
tasks.summary: 在 VM 上建 Knowledge API (GET /api/knowledge/*) runtime 讀 JSON，前端改打 VM。改 JSON 立刻生效不用 redeploy。涉及 11 個 import 點。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Build Knowledge API on VM agent-bridge-standalone/server.mjs. Add routes: GET /api/knowledge/profiles, /themes, /supply-chain, /stock-meta, /analysis-frameworks. Runtime read JSON files from ~/app/src/data/ and ~/app/src/lib/knowledge-base/.

tasks.title: VM: HTTPS + Auth token
tasks.summary: VM HTTP only + 無 auth。需要 Nginx 反向代理 + Let's Encrypt SSL + BRIDGE_AUTH_TOKEN。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Set up HTTPS and auth on GCP VM. Nginx reverse proxy + Let's Encrypt + BRIDGE_AUTH_TOKEN.

tasks.title: VM: 安裝 LLM CLIs (Codex/Qwen/Gemini)
tasks.summary: VM 上裝 Codex CLI, Qwen CLI, Gemini CLI + API keys。讓 Agent Bridge 可以 dispatch。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Install Codex CLI, Qwen CLI, Gemini CLI on GCP VM. Configure API keys. Verify Agent Bridge can spawn each.

tasks.title: 前端 11 個 static import 改打 VM Knowledge API
tasks.summary: stockClassifier.js(3), coverageAdapter.js(3), knowledgeBase.js(7), knowledgeEvolutionRuntime.js, brainRuntime.js 共 11 個 static JSON import 改成 fetch VM API。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Refactor 11 static JSON imports to fetch from VM Knowledge API. Files: stockClassifier.js, coverageAdapter.js, knowledgeBase.js, knowledgeEvolutionRuntime.js, brainRuntime.js.

tasks.title: P0: 修 stale enrichment invalidation
tasks.summary: usePortfolioDerivedData enriched dossiers 可能 stale → UI 顯示錯誤。加 invalidation + regression test。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Fix stale enrichment invalidation in usePortfolioDerivedData.js. Add invalidation mechanism + regression test.

tasks.title: P0: 移除 lifecycle sync 的 tab-gating
tasks.summary: useEventLifecycleSync 不該受 tab 影響。lifecycle sync 應在 portfolio-ready 就跑。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Remove tab-based gating from useEventLifecycleSync.js. Sync should run when portfolio-ready regardless of active tab.

tasks.title: P0: Events filter type regression test
tasks.summary: normalizeEventRecord 新增 type discriminator 可能 break EventsPanel filter。需 e2e regression test。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Write e2e regression test: normalizeEventRecord → EventsPanel filter → filterEventsByType() with legacy filter buckets.

tasks.title: P0: null date guard in useEventLifecycleSync
tasks.summary: parseSlashDate 可能回傳 null 導致 crash。加 null guard + unit test。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Add null-date guard to useEventLifecycleSync. Unit test forcing null return + verify graceful no-op.

tasks.title: 接通 cron target-price 到前端 (7/30 天規則)
tasks.summary: usePortfolioDerivedData ~L195 有 stub。fetch /api/target-prices，<7天優先，7-30天預警，>30天 fallback PER-band。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Implement target-price cron integration in usePortfolioDerivedData.js L195 stub. Fetch, prefer <7d, warn 7-30d, fallback >30d.

tasks.title: News vs Events UI 完全分離
tasks.summary: 加 type discriminator，渲染 split by type。news = 純資訊，event = 預測+復盤。改 NewsPanel + EventsPanel。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Implement news vs events UI separation. type:'news'|'event' discriminator, split rendering, news=info style, event=prediction+review.

tasks.title: 權證→標的股 UI + 目標價連動
tasks.summary: UI 顯示（標的：台積電），用 targets[underlyingCode] 的報告。加負測試。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Implement warrant→underlying UI. Show underlying name, use underlying targets. Add negative-path tests.

tasks.title: Target freshness 7/30 天 + noise 評估
tasks.summary: computeFreshnessGrade 30/90/120 → 7/30。先 snapshot 再改，避免 UI 爆量警告。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Change target freshness thresholds 30/90/120 → 7/30 in dateUtils.js. Snapshot before/after to assess UI noise.

tasks.title: 全組合研究行為驗證 — 權證策略框架
tasks.summary: 跑一次 /api/research portfolio mode，確認權證真的用 Delta/Theta/IV。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Trigger full portfolio research. Verify warrant sections use Delta/Theta/IV framework.

tasks.title: Auto-classifier 增量重分類 + 低信心 badge
tasks.summary: classifier 改 incremental（只重算 stale/unknown）。低信心用 badge 標示。配合 Knowledge API。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Implement incremental reclassification in stockClassifier.js. Add UI badges for low-confidence labels.

tasks.title: 補齊權證 enrichment 負測試
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Write negative-path tests for warrant enrichment in dossierUtils.js.

tasks.title: 補齊 freshness 邊界測試 (7/30 天)
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Write boundary tests for computeFreshnessGrade at 7/30 day thresholds.

tasks.title: 補齊 multi-stock event inference 測試
tasks.summary: autoReviewEvent 沒驗 entry/exit code overlap。加 basket event tests。
tasks.dispatchPrompt: Write tests for autoReviewEvent basket events. Validate entry/exit code overlap.
